title: The Dulce Base
author: Paul Bennewitz
content: The theory claims an underground facility near Dulce, New Mexico, houses joint human-alien genetic experiments.
action: Remote desert locations are ideal for classified, non-public operations.

title: The Chemtrail Theory
author: Online discourse
content: The theory suggests that chemical trails left by aircraft are actually deliberate efforts to disperse substances for mass control.
action: Public concern spikes whenever the government modifies the environment.

title: The Eisenhower-Alien Treaty
author: UFO lore
content: The theory posits that President Eisenhower signed a secret treaty with extraterrestrials in 1954 to exchange technology for access.
action: Technology gaps often drive narratives about hidden intergalactic aid.

title: The Agenda 21 / 2030 Conspiracy
author: Political commentators
content: The theory claims that UN sustainability goals are a blueprint for a totalitarian global government.
action: International policies often trigger fears of centralized, invasive control.

title: The Bermuda Triangle
author: Popular media
content: The theory suggests that unexplained disappearances in the Atlantic are caused by portals or extraterrestrial technology.
action: Unexplained vanishings naturally invite supernatural or high-tech theories.
